assertions.description: PCB source confirms 35 footprints: U2 (TO-252-2 SMD), U3 (SO-8 SMD), U4 (Seeed_XIAO, attr=smd) = 3 SMD; U1 (Si5351A, attr=through_hole), all THT passives and connectors = 25 THT; 6 graphics logos (G*** refs) and 1 footprint unaccounted. Board dimensions 86.944x39.751mm, fully routed (0 unrouted), GND pour on both layers with thermal vias for U2 correctly detected.

INCORRECT: The xiao schematic lists capacitors C1, C2, C3, C4, C5, C6, C7, C9, C10, C11 (no C8). The xiao PCB has C1, C2, C3, C4, C5, C6, C7, C8, C10, C11 (no C9). This is a genuine schematic-PCB mismatch — a capacitor was renumbered in one file but not the other. The analyzer does not flag this cross-file discrepancy. This is a design documentation issue, not an analyzer parsing error, but worth noting as an observation about the design state.
